idea-plugin.name: Intelirized
idea-plugin.description:
Intelirized

An Islands-style theme for JetBrains IDEs based on the classic Solarized Light palette by Ethan Schoonover.

Tuned for readability — body text contrast 9.16:1 (WCAG AAA), comments at 3.16:1 to recede without disappearing. Built for the new Islands UI introduced in 2025.12.
